# True Joy Birthing

> Free birth plan tools, doula cost guides, hospital info, and Medicaid coverage details for expecting families. Founded by Shelbi Kohler, certified birth doula (CD(DONA)). Covers 36 states, 134+ cities.

## Core Pages

- / — Free Joyful Birth Plan template, guided walkthrough, and confidence session
- /birth-plan-template/ — Free birth plan template download (no email required)
- /what-is-a-doula/ — What is a doula and what do they do
- /doula-cost/ — How much does a doula cost (state-by-state cost ranges)
- /benefits-of-a-doula/ — Evidence-based benefits of doula support
- /how-to-choose-a-doula/ — How to choose the right doula for your birth
- /postpartum-doula/ — What is a postpartum doula and do you need one
- /birth-plan-checklist/ — Birth plan checklist for hospital, birth center, or home birth
- /birth-plan-confidence-session/ — Live Zoom session with Shelbi to review your birth plan
- /guided-birth-plan-walkthrough/ — $47 video course walking you through your birth plan
- /faq/ — Frequently asked questions about doulas, birth plans, and True Joy Birthing
- /about/ — About Shelbi Kohler and True Joy Birthing

## Birth Plan Templates & Guides

- /birth-plan-scenarios/ — Birth plan scenarios for different situations
- /birth-plan-for-induction/ — Birth plan template for induced labor
- /c-section-birth-plan/ — Cesarean birth plan template
- /vbac-birth-plan/ — VBAC birth plan template
- /new-doula-start-here/ — Resources for new doulas starting their practice

## Location Pages (36 States, 134+ Cities)

Each city page includes: local hospital details with NICU levels, doula cost ranges, Medicaid doula coverage status, birth center info, and a free birth plan template.

- /birth-support/{city-state}/ — format: /birth-support/austin-tx/, /birth-support/denver-co/, etc.

### Medicaid Coverage States ( doula services covered)
Oregon, Washington, New Mexico, Utah, North Carolina, Colorado, California, New York, Massachusetts, Michigan, Illinois, Connecticut, Rhode Island, Pennsylvania, Arizona, Minnesota, Maryland, New Jersey, Virginia

### No Medicaid Doula Coverage
Texas, Georgia, South Carolina, Oklahoma, Ohio, Indiana, Florida (some county pilots exist), Tennessee, Nevada, Wisconsin, Missouri, Alabama, Kentucky, Idaho, Iowa, Nebraska, Mississippi

## Key Facts

- Founded by Shelbi Kohler, CD(DONA) — certified birth doula
- Free Joyful Birth Plan template (no email required, no signup wall)
- $47 Guided Birth Plan Walkthrough (video course)
- $250 Birth Plan Confidence Session (live Zoom with Shelbi)
- 134+ city-specific pages across 36 states
- Updated May 2026

- Website: https://truejoybirthing.com
- Email: support@truejoybirthing.com
- Address: True Joy Birthing, 104 E 600 S, #519, Heber City, UT 84032
